subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious and gracious Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Most High, the Most Great, wherein lie healing and mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب عز کریم نزل بالحق من لدی الله العلی العظیم و فیه شفاء و رحمه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude
